root_text.sn45.19:1.3: Katamaṁ nu kho, āvuso, brahmacariyaṁ, katamaṁ brahmacariyapariyosānan”ti?
root_text.sn45.19:1.5: Bhaddako kho te, āvuso bhadda, ummaṅgo, bhaddakaṁ paṭibhānaṁ, kalyāṇī paripucchā.
root_text.sn45.19:1.8: Katamaṁ nu kho, āvuso, brahmacariyaṁ, katamaṁ brahmacariyapariyosānan’”ti?
root_text.sn45.19:1.10: “Ayameva kho, āvuso, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo brahmacariyaṁ, seyyathidaṁ—
root_text.sn45.19:1.12: Yo kho, āvuso, rāgakkhayo dosakkhayo mohakkhayo—

translation_text.sn45.19:1.2: “Reverend, they speak of this thing called the ‘spiritual path’.
translation_text.sn45.19:1.3: What is the spiritual path? And what is the culmination of the spiritual path?”
translation_text.sn45.19:1.5: Your approach and articulation are excellent, and it’s a good question.
translation_text.sn45.19:1.7: ‘They speak of this thing called “the spiritual path”.
translation_text.sn45.19:1.8: What is the spiritual path? And what is the culmination of the spiritual path?’”
translation_text.sn45.19:1.10: “The spiritual path is simply this noble eightfold path, that is:
translation_text.sn45.19:1.11: right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.sn45.19:1.12: The ending of greed, hate, and delusion:
translation_text.sn45.19:1.13: this is the culmination of the spiritual path.”

reference_text.sn45.19:1.1: cck19.18, csp1ed14.14, csp2ed14.14, ms14S5_81, msdiv19, ndp15.16
